channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic is being traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Anthony Davis, a person with knowledge of the agreement said early Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: David Benavidez dominates David Morell with unanimous decision win to unify light heavyweight title
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — David Benavidez unified the light heavyweight championship by earning a unanimous decision over challenger David Morrell on Saturday night to keep his interim WBC belt and win the WBA title.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Calipari gets lukewarm response in return to Kentucky as Arkansas coach
item.description: LEXINGTON, Ky (AP) — John Calipari received a mixed reception on his return to Rupp Arena on Saturday night, then got the last laugh when his Arkansas Razorbacks beat No. 12 Kentucky 89-79. “It’s hard to win in here.
item.dc:creator: KEITH TAYLOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James has a triple-double and another win at Madison Square Garden as Lakers beat Knicks
item.description: LeBron James had 33 points, 12 assists and 11 rebounds in his 10th triple-double of the season, enjoying another memorable night at Madison Square Garden and leading the Los Angeles Lakers to a 128-112 victory over the New York Knicks.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Victor Wembanyama sits out Spurs' game against Heat because of an undisclosed illness
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Victor Wembanyama sat out the San Antonio Spurs' game Saturday night against the Miami Heat because of an undisclosed illness. Selected to his first All-Star Game as a Western Conference reserve Thursday, Wembanyama was ruled out 40 minutes prior to game time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Kelce fined for taunting Bills on Patrick Mahomes touchdown after not being penalized during game
item.description: Travis Kelce was fined $11,255 for taunting during an AFC championship game victory over the Buffalo Bills, but he wasn't penalized during the game for the stunt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz trade Mills and Eubanks for Bamba and Tucker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Five days before the NBA trade deadline, the Utah Jazz have made a deal with the Los Angeles Clippers. The Jazz have acquired center Mo Bamba, forward P.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stars acquire Granlund and Ceci from the Sharks in the latest move in flurry of NHL trades
item.description: The Dallas Stars acquired center Mikael Granlund and defenseman Cody Ceci from the San Jose Sharks on Saturday in the latest in a flurry of trades around the NHL.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago visits Detroit following Cunningham's 40-point game
item.description: Chicago Bulls (21-28, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Detroit Pistons (24-24, sixth in the Eastern Conference) Detroit; Sunday, 3 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Detroit hosts the Chicago Bulls after Cade Cunningham scored 40 points in the Detroit Pistons' 117-102 victory over the Dallas Mavericks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Eagles' Jalen Hurts addresses infamous 'straightjacket' comment directed at coach Nick Sirianni
item.description: Nick Sirianni's relationship with Jalen Hurts has been widely discussed for almost two seasons, but the Eagles star quarterback is making it clear the duo are on the same page.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rowdies Forrest Lasso returns to field after season-ending injury
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) - The Tampa Bay Rowdies returned to the field this week for preseason and so did veteran defender Forrest Lasso. After scoring two goals May 18, 2024, Lasso was named Player of the Week for his performance.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KTLA 5

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, NewsNation

item.title: One of the Oklahoma's best high school wrestling team's season suspended
item.description: A disciplinary decision from the Oklahoma Secondary Schools Activities Association (OSSAA) has ended the season for the girls wrestling team at Edmond North High School.
item.dc:creator: Sydnee Batzlaff/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Basketball: San Marcos 82, Poway 48
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Basketball at Poway on Tuesday evening with the Titans hosting San Marcos. The Titans were down 22-18 at the end of the 1st, but down 13 at the break and San Marcos kept the pedal to the metal and pulled off in the 2nd half and won 82-48.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation
